name: Paradyne Networks, Inc.
description: Paradyne Networks, Inc. was a prominent manufacturer of telecommunications hardware and networking equipment, headquartered in Largo, Florida. Established in 1969 as Paradyne Corporation, the company specialized in developing, manufacturing, and distributing broadband and narrowband network access products for network service providers and business customers. Throughout its history, the firm played a significant role in the evolution of computer communications systems. Paradyne Networks was eventually acquired, marking the end of its tenure as an independent entity in the communications equipment sector.
